# Let's load the six_hadith_books.json and search for matches.
import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys

path = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    data = json.load(f)

len(data), list(data.keys())[:10] if isinstance(data, dict) else None

# Prepare normalization and search functions
import re, unicodedata
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
from collections import Counter, defaultdict

def normalize_arabic(text):
    # Remove diacritics
    # Arabic diacritics range: \u064b-\u0652, plus \u0670 maybe, and shadda etc.
    text = re.sub(r'[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640', '')
    # normalize alef forms
    text = re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', text)
    # normalize taa marbuta to ه? Keep as ه? Usually convert ة->ه or to ت? Better to keep as ة because DB likely uses ة.
    # But many normalization map ى->ي
    text = text.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # Remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters/digits
    # Keep Arabic letters and digits and spaces and hamza (ء), and parentheses maybe not necessary.
    # Replace any non-Arabic/space/digit/ء with space.
    text = re.sub(r'[^0-9\u0600-\u06FF\u0750-\u077F\u08A0-\u08FF\uFB50-\uFDFF\uFE70-\uFEFFء]+', ' ', text)
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # lower not needed for Arabic but okay
    return text

# extract substring from response_context
response_context = """الإجابة على السؤال هي أن الكهف الذي أوى إليه فتية الكهف يقع في بلدة رقرقة، التي تقع في محافظة الشام (حالياً محافظة درعا في سوريا).
قال الله تعالى في القرآن الكريم:
"وَإِخْوَةُ الْكَهْفِ وَإِذْ تَقَوَّمُوا عَلَى أَهْلِهِمْ فَأَحَصْنَهُمْ فَأَفَخَطَتْ بِهِمُ الْغَارُ وَظَنَوا أَنَّ رَبَّهُمْ فَخِذٌ وَظَنَ النَّبِيُّ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَضْجَعِهِمْ وَلَوْ أَنَّهُمْ عَقِلُوا لَأَمَسُّوا بِأَيْدِيهِمْ وَذُوقُوا الْعَذَابَ مِنَ الْغَارِ وَلَقَدْ أَمْلَأْنَا بَيْنَهُمْ مِنْ بَيْنٍ" (سورة الكهف، الآية 15)
وقال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم:
"إِنَّ أَخَوانِ الْكَهْفِ لَم يُفَنَّ أَعقابُهُمَا وَلَوْ كُنَّا مُحَدِّثِينَ لَم يُؤَمَّنَ بِأَقاوِيلِنَا" (رواه البخاري)
وقال أيضاً:
"وَإِنَّ أَخَوانِ الْكَهْفِ لَم يُبَدَّدَ نُفوسُهُمَا" (رواه البخاري)
وفي رواية أخرى:
"وَإِنَّ أَخَوانِ الْكَهْفِ لَم يُفَنَّ أَعقابُهُمَا وَلَوْ كُنَّا مُحَدِّثِينَ لَم يُؤَمَّنَ بِأَقاوِيلِنَا وَلَوْ أَنَّهُمْ عَقِلُوا لَأَمَسُّوا بِأَيْدِيهِمْ وَذُوقُوا الْعَذَابَ مِنَ الْغَارِ" (رواه مسلم)
ومن الجدير بالذكر أن الكهف الذي أوى إليه فتية الكهف هو الكهف الذي وجدوه في جبل رقرقة، والذي كان يُسمى بالكهف المقدس."""
span_start, span_end = 756, 950
substring = response_context[span_start:span_end]
substring, len(substring)

query_full = substring
query_snippet = "وَإِنَّ أَ...َ الْغَارِ"  # from Provided_Span_Snippet but it's elided; better to use Original_Span snippet present in Provided_Span_Snippet? Provided is "وَإِنَّ أَ...َ الْغَارِ"
# But we should also search with cleaned query: maybe the small snippet isn't helpful.
norm_query = normalize_arabic(query_full)
len(norm_query), norm_query[:120]

from collections import Counter

def token_f1(a,b):
    a_tokens = a.split()
    b_tokens = b.split()
    a_count = Counter(a_tokens)
    b_count = Counter(b_tokens)
    common = sum((a_count & b_count).values())
    if common==0:
        return 0.0
    prec = common / len(b_tokens)
    rec = common / len(a_tokens)
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

top_by_f1 = []
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    texts = []
    if entry.get('Matn'):
        texts.append(entry['Matn'])
    if entry.get('hadithTxt'):
        texts.append(entry['hadithTxt'])
    for t in texts:
        norm_t = normalize_arabic(t)
        f1 = token_f1(norm_query, norm_t)
        top_by_f1.append((f1, i, t, norm_t[:200], entry.get('hadithID'), entry.get('title')))

top_by_f1_sorted = sorted(top_by_f1, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
top_by_f1_sorted[:30]

# search for entries containing 'اخوان' and 'كهف' tokens within DB normalized text
search_tokens = ['اخوان','الكهف','كهف']
results = []
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    texts = []
    if entry.get('Matn'):
        texts.append(('Matn', entry['Matn']))
    if entry.get('hadithTxt'):
        texts.append(('hadithTxt', entry['hadithTxt']))
    for field, t in texts:
        norm_t = normalize_arabic(t)
        if all(tok in norm_t for tok in ['اخوان','كهف']):  # both tokens present
            results.append((i, field, entry.get('hadithID'), entry.get('title'), t, norm_t[:300]))

len(results), results[:10]

for token in ['لم يؤمن','اقاويلنا','اقاويل','اقاويلنا']:
    ph = normalize_arabic(token)
    cnt = 0
    ex = None
    for i, entry in enumerate(data):
        for field in ('Matn','hadithTxt'):
            t = entry.get(field)
            if not t: continue
            norm_t = normalize_arabic(t)
            if ph in norm_t:
                cnt += 1
                ex = (i, field, entry.get('hadithID'), entry.get('title'), t[:200])
                break
    print(token, ph, cnt, ex)

from difflib import SequenceMatcher
best_blocks = []
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    for field in ('Matn','hadithTxt'):
        t = entry.get(field)
        if not t: continue
        norm_t = normalize_arabic(t)
        sm = SequenceMatcher(None, norm_query, norm_t)
        match = sm.find_longest_match(0, len(norm_query), 0, len(norm_t))
        size = match.size
        ratio = size / len(norm_query) if len(norm_query)>0 else 0
        if ratio > 0.5:  # show those with >50% substring overlap
            best_blocks.append((ratio, size, i, field, entry.get('hadithID'), entry.get('title'), norm_t[match.b:match.b+min(200,size)]))
len(best_blocks), sorted(best_blocks, reverse=True)[:20]

qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
with open(qpath, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    qv = json.load(f)

len(qv), qv[0].keys()

# search Quranic DB for any verses containing tokens from query
q_norms = [normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text']) for v in qv]

# find entries containing 'اصحاب الكهف' or tokens
tok = normalize_arabic('أصحاب الكهف')
matches = []
for idx, ntext in enumerate(q_norms):
    if 'اصحاب' in ntext and 'كهف' in ntext:
        matches.append((idx, qv[idx]['surah_name'], qv[idx]['ayah_id'], qv[idx]['ayah_text'], ntext[:200]))

len(matches), matches[:10]
